name: Computer Science Block
description: Core block for CSE and AIML classrooms, labs, and faculty offices.

name: Electronics & Communication Block
description: Dedicated building for ECE coursework, labs, and seminar spaces.

name: Mechanical Block
description: Workshop areas, mechanical labs, and practical training classrooms.

name: Civil Engineering Block
description: Civil engineering lecture halls, seminar rooms, and design studios.

name: Information Science Block
description: Information Science classrooms, research labs, and study spaces.

name: Administration Building
description: Campus administration, student services, and main auditorium venue.

name: Innovation Center
description: Innovation hub for hackathons, cultural events, and student collaborations.

name: Student Services Center
description: Central support center for counseling, placement, and student activity offices.
